name: Mark & Mary's Moist Blueberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups wild Maine blueberries, fresh or frozen (I use about 1 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Grease a muffin tray with 12 large muffin cups using a nonstick muffin pan.
3. In a bowl of an electric mixer, beat the egg whites until frothy.
4. Add the sugar and beat for 1 minute.
5. Stir in the applesauce, milk, maple syrup, and vanilla.
6. Gradually add the flour, baking powder, and salt, mixing just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
7. Gently fold in the blueberries.
8. Spoon the batter into the greased muffin cups.
9. Bake for 20 - 25 minutes or until golden and the center springs back when gently pressed.
10. Remove the muffins from the oven and set on a metal cooling rack for 10 - 20 minutes.
11. Using a knife, cut around each muffin and gently ease them out of the pan.
12. Set on the cooling rack.
